parsed.production_notes: Video features a real human actor in a physical indoor setting. Jump cuts are typical of social media vlog style. The AI voice is synthesized and added in post-production.

characters.appearance: Young female, fair skin, short curly reddish-brown hair. Has a white earbud in her right ear and beaded bracelets on her left wrist.
characters.wardrobe: Olive green hoodie with a black tree branch pattern.
characters.demeanor: Casual, expressive, transitioning from confused to surprised and impressed.

characters.appearance: Digital avatar on a phone screen showing a female face with purple hair.

scenes.setting: Indoor room, daytime. White walls, air conditioner, dark cabinet with a unicorn figurine.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is indoors, holding a pale yellow unlit candle and a smartphone. She wears a green patterned hoodie and a white earbud. The background features a white wall, an air conditioner, and a dark cabinet with a unicorn figurine. Soft natural lighting illuminates the scene.

scenes.visual_description: Character A interacts with her phone while holding a candle. Text overlays and emojis pop up on screen to highlight the vocabulary corrections being discussed. The camera angle remains fixed on her.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: What are you doing?
Character A says: I'm trying to burn the candle.
Character B says: You mean I'm lighting a candle?
Character A says: Oh, yeah, I'm lighting the candle. I really love the smell of it.
Character B says: Don't say "smell". In English smell usually means bad smells. You should say "scent".
Character A says: Ah, okay. I love the scent of the candle.
Character B says: Good job!
scenes.on_screen_text:
What are you doing?
I'm trying to burn the candle
❌
You mean I'm lighting the candle?
Oh, yeah, I'm lighting the candle
✅
I really love the smell of it
❌
Don't say "smell"
in English smell usually means bad smells
you should say "scent"
Ah okay, I love the scent of the candle
✅
Good job! 👍

scenes.setting: Indoor room, daytime. White walls, air conditioner, dark cabinet with a unicorn figurine.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A remains in the same indoor setting, still holding the candle and phone. She looks at the phone, glances away thoughtfully, then looks back with a surprised expression. The background and lighting are unchanged.

scenes.visual_description: Character A continues her conversation, showing a range of expressions from thoughtful to surprised. Subtitles track the dialogue, and a robot emoji appears when AI is mentioned.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I really need to improve my English.
Character B says: You should speak to a native every day.
Character A says: I don't have any money!
Character B says: Then speak to AI tutors.
Character A says: I don't want to talk to an AI.
Character B says: Surprise! I'm an AI teacher!
scenes.on_screen_text:
I really need to improve my English
You should speak to a native every day
I don't have any money!
Then speak to AI tutors
I don't want to talk to an AI 🤖
Surprise! I'm an AI teacher!

scenes.setting: Indoor room, daytime. White walls, air conditioner, dark cabinet with a unicorn figurine.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A looks at her phone with wide eyes and an impressed expression. She nods, speaks directly to the camera, and then brings the candle near her face to blow on it. The indoor setting and props remain the same.

scenes.visual_description: Character A reacts positively to the AI reveal. An app download prompt graphic appears over the video. She finishes speaking and blows out the unlit candle.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: You're very good!
Character B says: It's like talking to a human. Just download the Fluently app. We will talk everyday.
Character A says: Okay, so I'll just download Fluently and practice everyday!
scenes.on_screen_text:
You're very good!
It's like talking to a human
Fluently - AI English Tutor
learn and practice speaking
DOWNLOAD
Just download the FLUENTLY app
We will talk everyday
Okay, so I'll just download FLUENTLY and practice everyday!

scenes.visual_description: A digital end card with a solid blue background displays the app logo, name, a short tagline, and a download button.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Fluently App
AI-powered English coach
DOWNLOAD NOW
